sentences.english: Excuse me, could you help me? I'm looking for the nearest subway station.
sentences.korean: 실례합니다, 도와주실 수 있나요? 가장 가까운 지하철역을 찾고 있어요.

sentences.english: Of course! It's not far from here. Go straight down this street for about two blocks.
sentences.korean: 물론이죠! 여기서 멀지 않아요. 이 길을 따라 두 블록 정도 직진하세요.

sentences.english: Yes, and then turn left at the big intersection — you'll see a bank on the corner.
sentences.korean: 네, 그리고 큰 교차로에서 좌회전하세요 — 모퉁이에 은행이 보일 거예요.

sentences.english: Left at the bank. Got it.
After you turn left, walk for maybe one minute, and you'll see the station entrance on your right. There's a big blue sign. You can't miss it.
sentences.korean: 좌회전한 후 1분 정도 걸으면 오른쪽에 역 입구가 보일 거예요. 큰 파란 표지판이 있어서 못 지나칠 거예요.

sentences.english: That sounds easy enough. Thank you so much!
No problem. Have a good day!

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Panel Discussion — AI and the Future of Work
Academic Lecture — The Philosophy of Language
